name: Blackberry Crumb Pie
recipeInstructions: Combine first four ingredients; stir well. Place blackberries in unbaked pastry shell; sprinkle one tablespoon sugar over berries. Spread sour cream mixture over berries. Combine breadcrumbs, one tablespoon sugar, and butter; sprinkle over top. Bake at 375 degrees for 45 to 50 minutes or until center of pie is firm. Yield: one 9-inch pie.
